mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, template_name, link_mode, text_type, image_file_id, content, body_text, buttons, promotion_link, remark, created_at, updated_at, created_by, deleted_at
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM marketing_template
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{q.pageSize} OFFSET #{q.offset}
SELECT FROM marketing_template WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO marketing_template (template_name, link_mode, text_type, image_file_id, content, body_text, buttons, promotion_link, remark, created_at, updated_at, created_by) VALUES (#{templateName}, #{linkMode}, #{textType}, #{imageFileId}, #{content}, #{bodyText}, #{buttons}, #{promotionLink}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE marketing_template SET template_name = #{templateName}, link_mode = #{linkMode}, text_type = #{textType}, image_file_id = #{imageFileId}, content = #{content}, body_text = #{bodyText}, buttons = #{buttons}, promotion_link = #{promotionLink}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
